summary: Backend math/flow for sales+metrics works correctly. Critical 500 on GET /api/products caused by legacy MongoDB records lacking the new required Product fields (store, cost_price, sale_price), which breaks Inventory page and product autocomplete loading on UI.
passed: POST /api/sales with has_tax=true (Tienda A) creates sale; total=4760 for qty=2 price=2380
POST /api/sales with has_tax=false (Tienda B) creates sale; total=2000
GET /api/dashboard/realtime-metrics?period=today returns correctly split A/B day & month
Math verified: Tienda A compras=cost*qty=2000, gastos_fijos=(price/1.19 - cost)*qty=2000, inversion=0 (has_tax=true)
Math verified: Tienda B compras=1000, inversion=total=2000, gastos_fijos=0 (has_tax=false)
Frontend loads, login redirects to dashboard, Hoy/Este Mes switch present, Tienda A/B blocks render with correct values
'Incluye IVA' checkbox visible with helper text 'Se considera IVA (19%) - va a Gastos Fijos'

failed.issue: Returns 500 ResponseValidationError: legacy product docs in DB are missing required fields 'store', 'cost_price', 'sale_price'. Pydantic Product model rejects them.
failed.evidence: supervisor backend.err.log: 'fastapi.exceptions.ResponseValidationError: 15 validation errors ... loc: response,0,store ... input: {name: Bravery Salmon..., last_price, usage_count}'. curl GET /api/products -> HTTP 500 'Internal Server Error'.

failed.issue: UI shows toast 'Error al cargar productos' on dashboard and inventory page; axios 500 from /api/products spams console continuously (auto-refresh of realtime data also pulls products list).
failed.evidence: Console errors: 'Error fetching products: AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500' and 'Error fetching today data' repeating. Visible toast in screenshot.

failed.issue: Navigating to /inventory does NOT change URL (stays on /). Inventory may be rendered as a tab/button instead of a dedicated route; needs verification that an actual /inventory route exists per problem statement.
failed.evidence: page.goto('/inventory') => page.url remains 'https://sales-ledger-47.preview.emergentagent.com/'. Body still shows the dashboard layout.

action_items: Migrate or backfill legacy products in MongoDB to include store (default e.g. 'A'), cost_price (e.g. 0 or last_price), sale_price (e.g. last_price). Or relax the Product response model to make those fields Optional with sane defaults, then write a one-time migration.
Alternatively, in GET /api/products, filter/transform legacy docs (skip or coerce) before returning so endpoint stops 500'ing.
Verify /inventory route is wired in React Router; currently /inventory does not render a distinct page.
Re-test after fix: GET /api/products 200, inventory CRUD (create/edit/delete), product autocomplete in SalesForm, end-to-end sale -> metrics update.
